shared.bundleBody: Order this together with other certificates for a bundled discount on every assignment.

epc.body: The Energy Performance Certificate (EPC) is mandatory for every residential sale or lease in Belgium. Our certified inspectors deliver the documentation within days — your agents never block a signing again.
epc.bullet1: Certified EPC inspectors in Flanders, Brussels & Wallonia
epc.bullet2: Digital delivery (PDF + VEKA submission) within 3 working days
epc.bullet3: Bundling discount when ordered with other services
epc.regulation: Mandatory per Flemish Energy Agency (VEKA) regulations
epc.who: Every home sold or leased in Belgium
epc.title: Energy Performance Certificate
epc.dashboardDescription: Legally required energy rating for every sale or rental.

asbestos.body: The Asbestos Inventory Attest (AIV) is legally required for every building constructed before 2001 at the point of sale. Our certified asbestos experts inspect, sample and certify with turnaround times most agencies dream of.
asbestos.bullet3: Legally valid attestation, signed within 5 working days
asbestos.bullet4: Connected to your assignment — no double data entry
asbestos.regulation: Mandatory per Flemish OVAM regulations for pre-2001 buildings
asbestos.who: Any seller of a pre-2001 residential or commercial building
asbestos.title: Asbestos Inventory Attest
asbestos.dashboardDescription: Mandatory asbestos inventory for buildings from before 2001.

electrical.body: The Electrical Inspection (EK) ensures the property meets the Belgian AREI safety code. Required on sale and after major renovation work — and the first thing a buyer's lawyer will ask about.
electrical.bullet2: Compliant inspection report per AREI standards
electrical.bullet4: Integrated into the same dashboard as your other certificates
electrical.who: Any property sold or with recent electrical work
electrical.title: Electrical Inspection
electrical.dashboardDescription: AREI installation inspection for safe electrical systems.

fuel.body: Fuel Tank Checks (TK) are required periodically for above-ground and buried heating-oil tanks in Flanders. We schedule, inspect, issue the attest and alert you before the next one is due — so a routine check never delays a sale.
fuel.who: Homeowners and agents with heating-oil tanks on property
fuel.title: Fuel Tank Check
fuel.dashboardDescription: Periodic inspection for above-ground and buried fuel tanks.

photos.body: Professional listing photography for residential and commercial properties — wide-angle shots, balanced lighting, and a delivery turnaround that matches the pace of your listing pipeline.
photos.bullet2: Edited, listing-ready JPEGs delivered same day
photos.bullet3: Optional drone shots for villas and large properties
photos.bullet4: Bundled into your existing assignment workflow
photos.who: Agents listing residential or commercial properties
photos.title: Property Photography
photos.dashboardDescription: Professional listing photography for sales and rentals.

signage.body: We deliver and install For-Sale and For-Rent signage at the property, photographed once mounted so your listing goes live the same day as the inspection.
signage.bullet2: Branded with your agency's colours and contact info
signage.bullet4: Pickup + removal at the end of the listing
signage.who: Agents needing on-site presence at the property
signage.title: On-site Signage
signage.dashboardDescription: Mounted For-Sale / For-Rent signage at the property.
